front: Explain the design of nanoparticle-based vaccines mimicking viral structure.
back: Self-assembling protein nanoparticles (ferritin, I53-50) display antigens in multivalent array. Nanoparticle vaccines enhance B cell activation through BCR cross-linking. SpFN (ferritin) displays SARS-CoV-2 spike receptor binding domain. Ferritin nanoparticles in clinical trials for influenza.
